title: micromyrtus rotundifolia
intro: Micromyrtus rotundifolia, also known as the Round-leaf Micromyrtus, is a small shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Micromyrtus rotundifolia include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
